name: Almond-Pear Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs Pears, cored - peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Grease a 13x9x2 inch baking pan.
3. In a medium bowl, stir together flour, chopped almonds, brown sugar, nutmeg, mayonnaise, and almond extract until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Set aside.
4. In a large bowl with mixer on low speed, beat the pound cake mix, milk, and eggs until blended.
5. Increase mixer speed to medium and beat for 2 minutes.
6. Spread batter evenly in prepared pan.
7. Arrange pears in one layer on top of the batter and sprinkle with the remaining mixture.
8. Bake in a 325°F oven for 50-60 minutes or until a cake tester inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Allow to cool slightly in the pan before serving warm.
10. Serves great with sliced peaches as well.
